oauthClientId.title: OAuth Client ID
oauthClientId.description: OAuth client_id received from Volvo after publishing your app on developer.volvocars.com.

oauthClientSecret.title: OAuth Client Secret
oauthClientSecret.description: OAuth client_secret received from Volvo after publishing your app.

pollInterval.title: Poll Interval (seconds)
pollInterval.description: How often to refresh vehicle data from the Volvo API. Minimum 60 seconds.
